title: DROP TABLE fails for WITHOUT ROWID tables an SQLITE_OMIT_AUTOVACUUM
poc:
CREATE TABLE foo (num INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,comment TEXT COLLATE NOCASE)"
    " WITHOUT ROWID;
key_bug_features: DROP TABLE fails on WITHOUT ROWID with SQLITE_OMIT_AUTOVACUUM
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WITHOUT ROWID;
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE value IS NULL;
